prompt:
Ultra-detailed premium 3D render of a single sales funnel object, centered on pure black background (#000000). Aspect ratio 9:16 portrait. Octane/Blender/Cinema4D quality render.

SUBJECT:
One stylized 3D funnel — classic funnel silhouette: wide circular opening at top, smooth conical taper, cylindrical spout at bottom. Shown from a dramatic 3/4 perspective angle (camera tilted ~15° down from horizontal, rotated ~20° to the right) so we can see:
- The elliptical top rim with clear depth and thickness (the funnel has substantial wall thickness, ~3% of canvas width)
- The inside wall of the funnel catching light, with soft ambient occlusion at the bottom where the cone meets the spout
- The exterior cone surface with a smooth, continuous curve
- The cylindrical spout extending below with rounded edges

The object fills approximately 75% of canvas width and 85% of canvas height — bold, large, imposing.

COLOR & MATERIAL:
Glossy polished plastic material with rich subsurface depth. Use a smooth vertical gradient:
- Top rim (exterior): vibrant violet (#713DFF) with bright lilac highlights (#C8A4FF) catching the key light
- Mid cone: saturated violet (#5A2AD9) transitioning into deeper violet (#2E1A6B) at the lower cone
- Bottom of cone / spout junction: deep violet (#1F1250) 
- Spout: subtle warm orange accent (#F54900) blending upward into the deep violet — like heat radiating from the output point, integrated smoothly (no hard color line)
- Interior visible through top opening: dark violet (#2E1A6B) with soft inner rim light, slightly darker than the exterior

MATERIAL PROPERTIES:
- Glossy but NOT mirror-reflective — soft polished plastic, like premium product design
- Clear specular highlight on the upper-left of the cone (key light)
- Subtle fresnel rim light on the right edge (cool violet rim light #8A5FFF) for separation from black
- Soft ambient occlusion in crevices and inside the funnel
- Tiny specular highlight on the top rim edge making it read as a solid 3D lip

LIGHTING SETUP:
- Three-point studio lighting
- Key light: upper-left, warm white, creating primary highlights
- Fill light: lower-front, soft violet, lifting shadows
- Rim light: upper-right-back, cool violet, creating edge definition
- Soft contact shadow directly below the spout (very subtle, barely visible on black — just a darker gradient halo ~20% opacity)

RENDER QUALITY:
- Ray-traced, high sample count, no noise
- Sharp focus on the entire object (everything tack sharp)
- Clean smooth surfaces, no texture grain
- Crisp silhouette edges
- Premium brand aesthetic — think Apple product render, Stripe marketing asset, Linear brand illustration

STYLE REFERENCE: Premium 3D icon / hero asset. Modern, bold, iconic. NOT flat design, NOT cartoon, NOT photorealistic kitchen object. Stylized but with believable 3D depth and materiality.

NO spheres, NO tubes above, NO arrows, NO labels, NO text, NO liquid, NO droplets, NO particles. Just ONE solitary 3D funnel object on pure black.
negative_prompt: text, typography, letters, words, labels, arrows, lines, watermarks, spheres, balls, orbs, tubes, rods above funnel, liquid, droplets, pouring, splashing, particles, multiple funnels, duplicate objects, transparent, glass, crystal, see-through, chrome, mirror, metallic, gold, silver, photorealistic kitchen, hands, people, human figures, cartoon, flat design, 2D illustration, vector art, low poly, wireframe, noise, grain, blurry, out of focus, rainbow, blue funnel, cyan, green, yellow funnel, pink, red funnel, white funnel, gradient background, white background, gray background, colored background, room, floor, table, surface

settings.style: premium 3D product render, violet polished plastic with orange spout accent
settings.lighting: three-point studio: key upper-left, fill front, rim upper-right-back
settings.quality: ray-traced, high samples, clean smooth surfaces
